sponsor_season_description: Support the full season of productions and programs across PYT, with recognition and merchandise across all material.
matching_note: Many employers match charitable gifts dollar-for-dollar - search yours here to see if they do.
intro_body: Help us reach our goal for this year and beyond! Any amount, no matter how small or big, gets us closer.
sponsor_show_description: Back a single production, and receive (optional) recognition and merchandise tied to that show.
